narrative:
Pultney Township has 4,740 registered voters, with 65.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.2 percentage points.
